selection_rule.rule_note: Northeast Watch is counted inside the six India-focused signals. Public presentation should remain India / Northeast Watch / World.

firstLight.title: First Light — 10 Daily Signals
firstLight.intro: A curated daily signal rail will be generated after source registration, AI-assisted scoring and admin review.
firstLight.rule_note: Default daily selection: 10 signals — 5 India, 1 Northeast Watch and 4 World signals.
